mapper.insert: insert into course(name, code, credit, description) values(#{name}, #{code}, #{credit}, #{description})
mapper.update: update course set name = #{name}, code = #{code}, credit = #{credit}, description = #{description} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select id, name, code, credit, description from course where id = #{id}
select id, name, code, credit, description from course

select id, name, code, credit, description from course
and name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
and code like concat('%', #{code}, '%')
